name: Zenvia
description: Zenvia — Brazilian omnichannel CPaaS platform for SMS, WhatsApp, and email customer communications.

seo.title: Zenvia — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Zenvia: Zenvia — Brazilian omnichannel CPaaS platform for SMS, WhatsApp, and email customer communications.

when_to_use: Brazilian WhatsApp Business API for customer engagement
Omnichannel SMS + email CPaaS for Brazilian market
WhatsApp chatbot for Brazilian customer service
LGPD-compliant messaging platform for Brazilian enterprise

pros: Strong presence in Brazil and LatAm messaging
Omnichannel SMS, WhatsApp and email in one stack
Public company with enterprise compliance track
Local carrier relationships improve BR delivery
cons: Developer experience varies across acquired products
Pricing typically through sales, not self-serve
review.verdict: Go-to CPaaS inside Brazil and LatAm — solid regional pick if you do not need a global-first API.
review.best_for: Brazilian and LatAm enterprises running WhatsApp, SMS and email together
review.not_for: Global-first teams needing polished DX and worldwide self-serve
